data.title: Anglo American Faces Further Writedown on De Beers Unit
data.description: Anglo American has announced another writedown on its De Beers unit, reflecting ongoing challenges in its diamond operations. Bloomberg posted on X that the company is grappling with declining earnings due to the underperformance of its diamond business. The writedown highlights the persistent difficulties faced by Anglo American in maintaining profitability within this sector. The diamond market has been under pressure, affecting the company's financial results and prompting the need for reassessment of its asset values. Anglo American's decision underscores the broader challenges in the diamond industry, which has been impacted by fluctuating demand and market conditions.

data.title: Microsoft's Collaboration with OpenAI Highlighted by President Brad Smith
data.description: Microsoft President Brad Smith emphasized the significance of the company's partnership with OpenAI during an interview with Bloomberg TV's Haslinda Amin. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Smith's remarks on the collaboration's impact on technological advancements. Smith noted that the alliance has fostered innovation and development in artificial intelligence, contributing to Microsoft's strategic goals. The partnership is seen as a pivotal move in enhancing AI capabilities and driving progress in the tech industry. Smith's comments reflect the company's commitment to leveraging AI for future growth and development.

data.title: A whale closed out its long positions in ETH and BTC, incurring a loss of nearly $600,000.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale, "0x049", just closed its long positions in ETH and BTC, incurring a loss of $598,369.

data.title: How to Build an Airbnb Clone with AI in Under an Hour
data.description:
The vacation rental market will surpass $120 billion by 2027. Building a marketplace to capture even a small slice of that used to mean hiring developers, spending six figures, and waiting half a year for a minimum viable product. That math has changed. AI-powered development tools now generate full-stack web applications from plain text descriptions
source: https://www.ethnews.com/how-to-build-an-airbnb-clone-with-ai-in-under-an-hour/

data.title: UK Retail Sales Experience Fastest Growth in 20 Months
data.description: UK retail sales have begun the year with their most rapid growth in 20 months, marking an unexpected increase that may aid the Labour government's economic revival initiatives. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this surge in retail activity. The growth in sales could provide a much-needed boost to the economy, which has been facing challenges in recent times. Analysts suggest that this positive trend might support the government's strategies aimed at economic recovery. The unexpected rise in retail sales is seen as a potential catalyst for further economic improvements.

data.title: Bitmine's total Ethereum staked amount surpasses 3 million, reaching a value of $6.1 billion.
data.description: Bitmine disclosed that its total Ethereum staked amount has surpassed 3 million, reaching 3,040,483 as of February 16, 2026 (a total value of $6.1 billion at $1,998 per ETH). Staking increased by approximately 1 million ETH in the past three weeks, and the current staked amount represents about 69% of its 4.37 million ETH holdings. According to Fundstrat data, as of February 13, 2026, Bitmine's stock had a 5-day average trading volume of $900 million, ranking 158th among 5,704 listed stocks in the US, ahead of CBRE (ranked 92,159th). (PRNewswire)

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Sibanye Stillwater Announces First Dividend Since 2023 Amid Metal Price Surge
data.description: Sibanye Stillwater has declared its first dividend since 2023, following a significant rally in the prices of precious metals it produces. Bloomberg posted on X that the company's decision comes after a notable increase in the value of these metals last year. The mining firm, known for its production of platinum, palladium, and gold, has benefited from favorable market conditions, prompting this financial move. The dividend announcement marks a positive shift for Sibanye Stillwater, reflecting its improved financial performance and strategic response to the market dynamics.

data.title: The Coinbase Bitcoin Premium Index has been in negative territory for 36 consecutive days, currently at -0.0467%.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, the Coinbase Bitcoin premium index has been in negative territory for 36 consecutive days, currently at -0.0467%, marking its longest losing streak since May 2023. This surpasses the number of consecutive days with negative premiums during the "10/11 crash," and since 2026, it has only had two days with positive premiums. A negative premium indicates that the Coinbase price is below the global average, typically reflecting significant selling pressure in the US market, decreased investor risk appetite, increased market risk aversion, or capital outflows.

data.title: Ethereum Faces Pressure as Machi Big Brother Huang Licheng Places Limit Sell Orders
data.description: Machi Big Brother Huang Licheng has strategically placed nine limit sell orders for Ethereum, ranging between $1966 and $2002. According to NS3.AI, Huang holds a significant 25x leveraged long position of 7,800 ETH, with a liquidation price set at $1906. Despite the substantial position, he is currently experiencing an unrealized loss of approximately $220,000.

data.title: Britain Achieves Record Budget Surplus
data.description:
The United Kingdom has reported its largest budget surplus on record, highlighting a significant fiscal achievement. Bloomberg posted on X, noting that this surplus reflects the government's efforts to manage public finances effectively. The surplus is attributed to increased tax revenues and controlled public spending, which have contributed to this financial milestone.

The Office for National Statistics (ONS) released data showing that the surplus was driven by higher income tax receipts and a reduction in government borrowing. This development comes as the UK economy continues to navigate post-pandemic recovery challenges.

Economists suggest that the surplus provides the government with more flexibility in addressing future economic uncertainties. However, they also caution that ongoing global economic pressures could impact future fiscal performance.

The record surplus is seen as a positive indicator of the UK's economic health, but experts emphasize the importance of maintaining fiscal discipline to ensure long-term stability.

data.title: Crypto Mortgage Lender Milo Surpasses $100 Million in Originations
data.description:
Miami-based fintech reports zero margin calls across its portfolio despite sustained market volatility, closes record $12 million transaction
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2026/02/20/crypto-mortgage-lender-milo-surpasses-100-million-in-originations/

data.title: Bitcoin's Historical Cycle Patterns Suggest October Bottom
data.description: Crypto Rover posted on X that historical patterns in Bitcoin's market cycles indicate a potential bottom in October. According to past trends, there are typically 1,064 days between a cycle's bottom and its top, and 364 days between the top and the subsequent bottom. This analysis suggests that Bitcoin may reach its lowest point this month, following these historical cycle patterns.

data.title: STOCKS | UniSuper CIO Downplays Global Tech Stock Concerns
data.description: The Chief Investment Officer of UniSuper, one of Australia's largest pension funds, has dismissed worries regarding the decline in global tech stocks. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the CIO's perspective that investment in the technology sector can bolster other areas of the market. Despite the recent downturn, the CIO remains optimistic about the broader market impact, suggesting that tech spending could provide stability and growth opportunities in different sectors. This outlook comes amid ongoing fluctuations in the global stock market, particularly affecting technology companies.

data.title: India's Market Regulator Issues Notice to Zee Entertainment Over Allegations
data.description: India's market regulator has issued a show-cause notice to Zee Entertainment Enterprises Ltd. and its leadership, reviving allegations of fund diversion and governance lapses. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that these issues previously disrupted the company's planned merger with Sony. The notice is part of ongoing scrutiny into the company's financial practices and governance standards. Zee Entertainment has been under investigation for alleged financial irregularities, which have raised concerns among investors and stakeholders. The regulator's action underscores the importance of transparency and accountability in corporate governance, particularly in high-profile mergers and acquisitions. The outcome of this notice could have significant implications for Zee Entertainment's future business operations and its potential merger with Sony.

data.title: STOCKS | South Korean Stock Market Continues Two-Day Rally
data.description: South Korea's stock market has experienced a two-day upward trend, closing at 5,808 points, marking an increase of 131 points or 2.31%. According to RTHK, the market has risen approximately 5.5% over the two days this week, continuing a two-week streak of gains.

data.title: Danone Reports Increased Sales Driven by High-Protein Products
data.description: Danone experienced a rise in sales towards the end of last year, driven by strong demand for its protein-rich yogurts and fortified beverages designed for cancer patients. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's successful performance in these product categories. The growth reflects a broader consumer trend towards health-focused food options, which has benefited Danone's portfolio. The company's strategic focus on nutrition and health has positioned it well in the market, contributing to its positive sales trajectory.

data.title: Brother Machi placed nine limit sell orders for ETH in the $1966 to $2002 range.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Huang Licheng, nicknamed "Big Brother Machi," has placed nine limit sell orders for ETH in the $1966-$2002 range. Currently, his 25x leveraged long position in Ethereum still holds 7800 ETH, with a liquidation price of $1906, resulting in a floating loss of approximately $220,000.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Surges 15% Amid Price Slump
data.description: Bitcoin's mining difficulty has risen by 15% to reach 144.4 trillion, marking the largest increase since 2021. According to NS3.AI, this significant uptick occurs despite a decline in Bitcoin's price and a multi-year low in hashprice. The network's hashrate has rebounded to 1 exahash per second, indicating heightened activity among miners.

data.description:

source: https://coindoo.com/here-is-how-blockchain-solves-a-major-public-health-crisis/
